title: Aptiv to Release Third Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: DUBLIN , Sept. 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), will release its third quarter 2023 financial results on November 2, and will hold an investor call the same day at 8:00 a.m.

title: Auto parts makers' stocks rally, as UAW's expanded strike provides a boost
text: Shares of auto parts makers traded mostly higher Friday, after the United Auto Workers union said it was expanding its strike to nearly 40 in-house auto-parts distribution centers of General Motors Co. GM, +0.50% and Stellantis N.V. STLA, +0.68%.

title: The UAW Strike Is Almost Here. Stocks to Buy, Sell, and Watch Carefully.
text: The labor contract between the United Auto Workers and the Detroit-Three automakers expires Thursday. A deal isn't done and the UAW might declare a strike on Friday.

title: A Potential UAW Strike Has Created An Opportunity In Auto Parts Stocks
text: UBS analyst Joe Spak launched coverage of serval auto parts companies. Trends toward EVs and self-driving cars matter, but so do UAW labor negotiations.

title: The 7 Best Autonomous Driving Stocks to Buy Now: September 2023

title: Aptiv: Positive Momentum Should Continue Through FY25
text: Aptiv's recent performance, particularly in the ASUE segment, shows positive profitability and potential for further growth. 2Q23 results demonstrate strong revenue growth, outperforming industry standards, with key segments like active safety and high voltage expanding significantly. The long-term risk is that growth will ultimately rely on overcoming competition challenges to expand the number of content per vehicle.
